evals.prompt: I have a Rust project and I want to add a REST API layer and a CLI layer in parallel using grove. How should I set this up?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend 2-3 builders with explicit file ownership, suggest runtime selection, mention sequential merge, warn about main.rs conflicts, and provide grove sling commands

evals.prompt: My grove agent completed but the branch wasn't merged and now there are conflicts. What do I do?
evals.expected_output: Should walk through grove merge, conflict marker detection with grep, manual resolution, and reference the anti-pattern of not merging sequentially

evals.prompt: I want to use Codex agents instead of Claude for a grove build to save costs. What do I need to know?
evals.expected_output: Should explain --runtime codex, --no-directives to avoid parallel cargo deadlock, --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox, AGENTS.md instruction path, and model alias filtering
